== French Defense: Steiner Variation ==
The '''Steiner Variation''' is a counterattacking option against the French. It most often results in a trade of two pawns after [[/2...d5/]] 3. exd5 exd5 4. cxd5 Qxd5 5. Nc3, where black is behind in development but has a stronger pawn structure. Another more infamous line is the Orthoschnapp Gambit after [[/2...d5/]] 3. cxd5 exd5 4. Qb3!?, with the idea of Bc4, Nc3, and possibly sacrificing a pawn on d3.
title: Chess Opening Theory/1. e4/1...e6/2. c4
